author: Michael J. Meraw
purpose: Machine-readable gate for RevisionGrade evaluation regression tests. An evaluation of this manuscript FAILS if any REQUIRED check is unmet or any FORBIDDEN check triggers.

forbidden_unsupported_terms.description: These labels are not supported by manuscript source text and must not appear in evaluation output.
forbidden_unsupported_terms.gate_behavior: CANON_GROUNDING_ERROR — evaluation must be rejected if any forbidden term appears without direct manuscript citation.

required_entities.description: Tiered treatment requirements. Each tier must be satisfied independently; meeting a lower tier does not satisfy a higher tier.

entities.tier_2_role: Intellectually adaptive / mocked / partially disabled newt; bullied by Twillow; comforted by Lacerta via Twen doctrine
entities.tier_5_recommendation_check: Do not recommend 'adding Newton.' Newton is present. Recommend sharpening or re-echoing only.

entities.tier_2_role: Newton's mother; maternal anchor; delivers Twen-centered comfort doctrine
entities.tier_5_recommendation_check: Do not recommend 'adding Lacerta.' Lacerta is present. Identify her as Newton's mother explicitly.

entities.tier_2_role: Social antagonist / bully-catalyst; persecutes Newton; reveals Gorfian enforcement at micro level
entities.tier_5_recommendation_check: Do not recommend 'adding a bully character.' Twillow IS the bully. Recommend amplifying Twillow's doctrinal function.

entities.tier_2_role: Doctrinal counter-system to Gorf; comfort language for newts; functions as moral/ecological alternative, not merely superstition
entities.tier_5_recommendation_check: Do not describe Twen as 'background religion.' Twen is a doctrinal counter-system. Do not recommend 'clarifying' unless treatment is genuinely unclear.
entities.warning: Do NOT frame Twen/Newtlore as an 'active threat' to Gorf unless source text explicitly dramatizes Gorfian authority reacting to it.

entities.tier_2_role: Frog protagonist; student of Thorander; develops cross-species healing cooperation with Newton
entities.tier_5_recommendation_check: Rana–Newton healing arc is a PRIMARY SPINE, not background. Closure score must reflect this arc.

entities.tier_2_role: Major Orgon elder / cosmologist / reform-pressure figure; teaches Rana; represents soft-power alternative to Hyla's hard authority
Human antagonist; represents human nihilism/cruelty; primary agent of ecological harm in human damage lane
Frog authority; toadstone holder; Gorfian doctrine enforcer
Frog polity operator; shard-addiction subplot; subordinate to Hyla

required_relationships.description: These relationship spines must be evaluated, not merely mentioned. Each has a minimum treatment level.

relationships.minimum_treatment: Must be evaluated as a structural spine with criterion-level impact on Closure and Character
relationships.gate_note: If Rana–Newton is omitted, Narrative Closure score MUST NOT exceed 6/10. A high Closure score without this spine is a scoring error.

relationships.function: Maternal bond / Twen delivery / emotional anchor
relationships.minimum_treatment: Must identify Lacerta as Newton's mother and Twen as the comfort doctrine she delivers

relationships.function: Bully/victim dynamic; Gorf enforcement at micro/social scale
relationships.minimum_treatment: Must identify Twillow as Newton's bully and connect to doctrinal enforcement theme

relationships.function: Competing doctrinal systems; domination vs. healing/adaptation
relationships.minimum_treatment: Must treat as parallel systems, not hierarchy

relationships.function: Human nihilism / cruelty; source of ecological harm
relationships.minimum_treatment: Must identify as human damage lane
Must identify Thorander as Rana's teacher and an Orgon reform-pressure figure

required_object_systems.description: These objects/systems must be evaluated as functional elements of the manuscript, not merely named.

objects.function: Biological survival system; counter-toadstone; solution to environmental blight; vehicle for Rana–Newton cooperation
objects.minimum_treatment: Must be evaluated as a medicine/object SYSTEM, not a passing reference. Must connect to Rana–Newton arc and environmental blight.

objects.function: Hierarchical authority icon; Hyla's instrument of Gorfian power
objects.minimum_treatment: Must be connected to Gorf doctrine and authority system

objects.function: Forbidden pleasure / addiction vector; Zimeon subplot
objects.minimum_treatment: Must be noted in object/symbol system

objects.function: Environmental contamination marker; spatial consequence of Brutus/Chey human damage
objects.minimum_treatment: Must be evaluated as environmental/spatial consequence, not merely named
objects.note: Architecture revision priority: shift Dead Zone framing from 'where frogs get netted' to 'where the ecosystem dies / newt habitat is contaminated.'

objects.function: Doctrine engine; ideological authority; tonal register setter
objects.minimum_treatment: Must evaluate function, not merely acknowledge presence. Do not recommend 'pruning' without specifically identifying what to prune and why.

required_structural_lanes.description: These structural lanes must be represented in the evaluation. Missing an entire lane is a STRUCTURAL_LANE_OMISSION failure.

closure_score_governance.description: Scoring governance rule: Narrative Closure score must reflect the presence or absence of the Rana–Newton arc.
closure_score_governance.rule: If the evaluation omits the Rana–Newton healing arc, Narrative Closure MUST NOT be scored above 6/10.
closure_score_governance.corollary: A Closure score of 7/10 or higher is only valid if the evaluation explicitly accounts for the Rana–Newton arc and the juniper medicine system.
closure_score_governance.offending_evaluation_violation: fa730c9c scored Closure at 4/10 without identifying the arc — undercounted the partial closure already present. Truth target: 6/10.

recommendation_already_present_guard.description: Any recommendation to 'add,' 'introduce,' or 'create' the following elements is a RECOMMENDATION_ERROR. These elements are already present in the manuscript.

revise_queue_protections.description: Rules for what may and may not enter the Revise queue from an evaluation of this manuscript.
blocked_from_revise_queue: Any task recommending 'add Newton' (Newton is present)
Any task recommending 'add Lacerta' (Lacerta is present)
Any task recommending 'add a bully character' (Twillow is the bully; he is present)
Any task recommending 'add a medicine system' (juniper medicine is present)
Any task recommending 'clarify the newt world' without citing a specific gap
required_revise_queue_entries: Re-echo Rana–Newton healing spine near excerpt hinge
Clarify spatial stakes of the Dead Zone as ecosystem death, not just frog netting site
Sharpen Twillow's Gorfian-doctrine function at micro/social scale
Strengthen Twen/Newtlore as a doctrinal counter-system (not background superstition)
Foreground juniper berry / medicine arc as counter-toadstone

ci_acceptance_gate.description: A future evaluation of Froggin Noggin PASSES this fixture if ALL of the following return true.

acceptable_score_delta.description: A future evaluation passes if its scores fall within this delta from the truth target.

known_failure_specimen.label: original_offending_evaluation_v1
critical_misses: Juniper berry / medicine system omitted entirely

largest_criterion_gap.cause: Arc blindness — Rana–Newton arc omitted, so closure architecture was invisible to evaluator
